recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - L’autre c’est moi
recommendations.overview: L'Autre c'est moi est le troisième spectacle de l'humoriste Gad Elmaleh, en 2005.

recommendations.title: Midnight in Paris
recommendations.overview: While on a trip to Paris with his fiancée's family, a nostalgic screenwriter finds himself mysteriously going back to the 1920s every day at midnight.

recommendations.title: Gad Gone Wild
recommendations.overview: French comic Gad Elmaleh regales a Montreal crowd with tales of awkward mix-ups and baffling customs he's encountered since moving to the U.S.

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh: American Dream
recommendations.overview: In his first English-language special, comedian Gad Elmaleh gleefully digs into America's food obsessions, dating culture, slang, and more.

recommendations.title: Gad Elmaleh - Papa est en haut
recommendations.overview: Dans ce spectacle, mis en scène par sa soeur Judith Elmaleh, il parle de son enfance, de son fils et de son père ; 750 000 places seront vendus.

recommendations.title: Two Worlds
recommendations.overview: A French tradesman travels in time and liberates an oppressed tribe in another world.

recommendations.title: Coco Chanel & Igor Stravinsky
recommendations.overview: Paris 1913. Coco Chanel is infatuated with the rich and handsome Boy Capel, but she is also compelled by her work. Igor Stravinsky's The Rite of Spring is about to be performed. The revolutionary dissonances of Igor's work parallel Coco's radical ide

recommendations.title: Train of Life
recommendations.overview: In 1941, the inhabitants of a small Jewish village in Central Europe organize a fake deportation train so that they can escape the Nazis and flee to Palestine.

recommendations.title: Coco Before Chanel

recommendations.title: Trick or Treat Scooby-Doo!
recommendations.overview: Mystery Inc. has cracked the case to top all cases! They’ve tracked down Coco Diablo, the head of a notorious costume crime syndicate. With Coco and her kitty in prison, Mystery Inc. thinks that they can finally enjoy a break. Wrong! Suddenly, menaci
